title: malus baccata f. zumi
intro: Malus baccata f. zumi, also known as the Chinese crabapple or Ussuri crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, and is valued for its potential to promote digestive health and relieve fever and pain. The health benefits of Malus baccata f. zumi include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. Malus baccata f. zumi is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried fruit, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as an ingredient in patent medicines and decoctions.
